title: Dungeon Degenerates - Let's Play - Establishing a Base - Part 5
body:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Y66yYblAsq8

Daniel (@dungeondive) faces his biggest fight yet—the finale of the establishing a base mission. Three monsters emerge at the Sunken Village: a Slime Corpse (newly dangerous thanks to the Hand of Doom), a Fish-Eyed Warlock that curses him (reducing morale), and a Bull Scrog Croaker that summons additional creatures mid-combat. The Vermin Hunter pulls off a master performance with consistent rolls and smart target prioritization, becoming the true carrying force.

The Bloodsport Brawler gets backed into a corner, dropping to near-death HP and burning every luck point just to survive. But she endures. When the final monster falls, the Vermin Hunter's loot roll nets the Saint's Finger—a blessed relic that grants immunity to curse abilities. Perfect timing.

With the encounter won, Daniel immediately invests the final gold into the Stone Circle, pushing its town level to four. Mission accomplished. His party has established their grimy fortress in the marshlands, in the shadow of the ancient stone hinge where witches and warlocks convene. The Hand of Doom is temporarily checked, one doom token removed from the track, and a new mission awaits: the Crown of Cruelty, where a madman king attempts to summon a Leviathan from the depths.

----

**What's your ideal campaign length—a quick weekend adventure or a month-long saga?**
